nhf.legalBasis: National Housing Fund Act, Section 4 — Employee contribution of 2.5% of basic salary

nsitf.legalBasis: Employee Compensation Act 2010, Section 56 — Employer contribution of 1% of monthly payroll to NSITF

refund.description: Up to 50% of ITF contribution refundable against qualifying training spend

itf.legalBasis: Industrial Training Fund Act, Section 6 — 1% of annual payroll for employers with 5+ employees or ₦50M+ annual turnover
